inline_comments.message: Interesting - wonder if this is somethign that was missing from xacml-pdp and why i was having a lot of trouble last week with Junits running in different order.

it might, since it also shuts down any rest servers that happen to still be running.  It wasn't really needed in this case, but I wanted to cover all bases in case we choose to use different properties in future junit tests - din't want one set interfering with the other and then trying to figure out what went wrong.
